# Barekyne

> India's WHO-GMP certified, CDSCO-approved B2B clinical skincare brand. Offers exclusive district-level monopoly PCD franchise rights, wholesale, and clinic supply across India. Engineered for melanin-rich Indian skin (Fitzpatrick IV–VI). Founded 2024, headquartered in Yamunanagar, Haryana. Contact: +91 70275 72757 | info@barekyne.in

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://barekyne.in/): Brand overview, featured products, and franchise opportunity summary
- [Products](https://barekyne.in/products): Full 5-SKU clinical skincare product catalogue with ingredients and pricing
- [Distributorship](https://barekyne.in/distributorship): PCD franchise model, monopoly rights, investment details, and onboarding process
- [Skincare Distributor Hub](https://barekyne.in/skincare-distributor): City-wise franchise territory availability across India
- [Early Access](https://barekyne.in/early-access): Apply for exclusive pre-launch district-level franchise rights
- [Doctor Supply](https://barekyne.in/doctor-supply): Institutional bulk pricing for dermatologists and clinics
- [Bulk Orders](https://barekyne.in/bulk-orders): Wholesale skincare supply for pharmacies and distributors
- [Blog](https://barekyne.in/blog): Clinical skincare science, PCD franchise guides, and market analysis
- [FAQ](https://barekyne.in/faq): 20 comprehensive answers on franchise, products, certifications, and investment
- [Contact Franchise](https://barekyne.in/contact-franchise): Franchise inquiry and territory application form
- [About](https://barekyne.in/about): Company background, scientific philosophy, and certifications
- [Contact](https://barekyne.in/contact): General business enquiries

## Products

- [Bare-UV Sunscreen](https://barekyne.in/products/bare-uv-sunscreen): SPF 50 PA++++ hybrid invisible shield. Dual physical-chemical UV filter, zero white cast, Zinc PCA sebum regulation. MRP ₹649 / 50g
- [Bare-C20 Serum](https://barekyne.in/products/bare-c20-serum): 20% Ethyl Ascorbic Acid multi-pathway brightening serum with Niacinamide and Liquorice. Climate-stable, no yellowing. MRP ₹990 / 30ml
- [Bare Night Cream](https://barekyne.in/products/bare-night-cream): Triple-pathway overnight depigmentation with 2% Kojic Acid Dipalmitate, 3% Niacinamide, 1.5% Alpha Arbutin. MRP ₹499 / 50g
- [Cicaglow Facewash](https://barekyne.in/products/cicaglow-facewash): Barrier-first multi-acid cleanser (Glycolic + Salicylic + Lactic) with Polyglutamic Acid paradoxical hydration. MRP ₹549 / 100ml
- [Bare-Hydra Lotion](https://barekyne.in/products/bare-hydra-lotion): Body brightening lotion with 90% melanin inhibition (in-vitro). Dermawhite WF + Papaya + Saxifraga. MRP ₹499 / 200ml

## Blog (Selected)

- [Early Access Monopoly Franchise](https://barekyne.in/blog/barekyne-early-access-monopoly-franchise-2026): Why securing a district-level monopoly franchise during Early Access is the highest-ROI B2B investment in 2026
- [Derma PCD Franchise Guide](https://barekyne.in/blog/complete-guide-starting-derma-pcd-franchise-india): Complete guide to starting a high-margin Derma PCD franchise in India
- [Anti-Pigmentation Franchise](https://barekyne.in/blog/anti-pigmentation-derma-franchise-solutions-india-2026): Why anti-pigmentation is the highest-demand clinical skincare segment in India
